obligation: T-W9 (mechanical part) — each warden-owned per-leg residual is committed with a non-`fix:` chore(warden) subject; the red-team leg is clean so the terminating read-only pass over SHA_pre_redteam..HEAD is EMPTY and benignly passes. (T-W9's live commit-ordering is routed to Acceptance-Gate-2, not scored here.)
diff_shape: NON-security, multi-file — temper AND delve each leave a working-tree residual that warden commits; red-team leaves NO residual (clean)

per_leg_verdict_vector.temper: trips then fixes (uncommitted) → warden commits residual as chore(warden): temper fixes
per_leg_verdict_vector.delve: trips a kept gating finding; `delve --fix` applies the unambiguous repair (working-tree only) → warden commits residual as chore(warden): delve fixes; re-run clears the predicate
per_leg_verdict_vector.red-team: quality-gate verdict PASS — NO fix rounds, NO residual, so SHA_pre_redteam..HEAD is empty
per_leg_verdict_vector.inquisitor: all adversarial tests PASS; self-commits (no residual)

_note: Operator input for the live /warden run. The scorer never reads this file.
